package rulecoverage

func PositiveWeakHashForIntegrity() string {
    ruleID := "weak_hash_for_integrity"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`md5.New()`, `sha1.New()`, `md5.Sum()`, `sha1.Sum()` used for integrity checks, checksums, or MAC operations (not just `weak_crypto` import-level detection)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
